title: Renewal of License. A licensed manning agency should submit an
content: 16 application for the renewal of its license within ninety (90) calendar days prior to the 17 expiration of its license. The application shall be supported by the following documents: 18 19 a. Updated DTI registration in case of a sole proprietorship, or General Information 20 Sheet in case of a partnership and corporation; 21 22 b. Renewed/new escrow agreement with a commercial bank authorized to handle 23 trust accounts by the BSP supported by a bank certification; 24 25 c. Proof of deposit of additional escrow as required under Section 22 (Additional 26 Escrow Deposit), if the LMA has pending recruitment violation case/s; 27 28 d. Duly filed latest audited financial statements and income tax returns of the LMA. In 29 case the equity of the LMA is below the minimum capitalization requirement, it shall 30 be given thirty (30) calendar days from release of the renewed license to submit a 31 SEC certification on capital infusion; otherwise, the license shall be suspended 32 until it has complied with such a requirement; 33 34 e. Clearances from the NBI and the Migrant Workers Protection Bureau (MWPB) for 35 sole proprietor, partners, members of the board of directors, officers, and 36 personnel; 37 38 f. Certificate of no pending repatriation case from the Department; 39 40 g. Certification stating the track record of pending cases from the Adjudication 41 Bureau; and 42 43 h. QMS Manual or equivalent ISO Certification; 44 45 The Department shall only accept applications with complete documentary requirements 46 for evaluation based on the checklist of requirements. The Department shall evaluate the 47 application and inform the applicant in writing of any deficiency or lack of requirements 48 for compliance by the licensed manning agency. No application shall be accepted after 49 the date of expiration of the license. 50 51 The Department, in accordance with law and after consultation with the stakeholders, 52 may modify the list or prescribe additional requirements for renewal of license. 53 54
